svg.title: GrantCraft architecture diagram
svg.desc: 4-agent pipeline: user input flows through Grant Researcher, Requirements Analyzer, Proposal Writer, and Judge, then to output display

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What inputs does GrantCraft collect from the user?')
g.text: Title · category · region · budget · org type

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Grant Researcher agent work?')
g.text: Searches gov.in · serb · NIH · EU Horizon · Gates
Finds real active grants with amounts and deadlines

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Requirements Analyzer agent do?')
g.text: Maps grant criteria to project strengths
Ranks top 2-3 best-fit grants · flags gaps

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Proposal Writer agent produce?')
g.text: Writes all 8 sections of the grant proposal

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the LLM-as-Judge evaluate the proposal?')
g.text: Scores on 5 criteria · out of 25 total

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the output display show?')
g.text: 4 tabs: found grants · requirements · proposal · score

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is Python used for in this project?')

svg.text: Fallback: if Gemini quota exhausted, each agent runs independently using Tavily + templates
